cloudformation.hookdefaultversion.CfnAbo: The `HookDefaultVersion` resource specifies the default version of the hook. The default version of the hook is used in CloudFormation operations for this AWS account and AWS Region.

cloudformation.hookdefaultversion.TypeNa.Description: The name of the hook.  You must specify either `TypeVersionArn`, or `TypeName` and `VersionId`.

cloudformation.hookdefaultversion.TypeVe.Description: The version ID of the type configuration.  You must specify either `TypeVersionArn`, or `TypeName` and `VersionId`.

cloudformation.hookdefaultversion.Versio.Description: The version ID of the type specified.  You must specify either `TypeVersionArn`, or `TypeName` and `VersionId`.
